Motion For Protective Order Concerning Deposition Of Deft Lilienthal
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Shalini Squattlebaum, Esq. ALDERLAW, PC (310) 275-9131 ssquattlebaum@alderlaw.com
Attorney for Plaintiff Magela Rivas
NICHOLAS R. NEWMAN, Esq., MCNAMARA, AMBACHER,WHEELER, HIRSIG &GRAY LLP (707) 427-3998 Nicholas.Newman@mcnamaralaw.com Attorney for Defendant BENJAMIN HOWARD LILIENTHAL

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BENJAMIN LILIENTHAL'S Motion For Protective Order Concerning Deposition Of Deft Lilienthal

DEFENDANT BENJAMIN HOWARD LILIENTHAL'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "'DEFENDANT" OR "LILIENTHAN") MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER CONCERNING DEPOSITION OF LILIENTHAL IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION AS FOLLOWS:

(1) AT THE OUTSET OF THE CONTINUED DEPOSITION OF LILIENTHAL COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF WILL IDENTIFY ON THE RECORD THE IDENTITY OF THE COUNSEL WHO WILL BE CONDUCTING THE EXAMINATION OF LILIENTHAL ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF.

(2) THE INDIVIDUAL SO IDENTIFIED WILL BE THE ONLY INDIVIDUAL WHO MAY DIRECT ANY QUESTION TO LILIENTHAL EXCEPT FOR LILIENTHAL'S COUNSEL.

(3) ALL OBJECTIONS MADE BY COUNSEL FOR LILIENTHAL SHALL BE NON-SPEAKING OBJECTIONS AND, EXCEPT FOR A CLAIM THAT THE QUESTION SEEKS TO INVADE THE ATTORNEY/CLIENT PRIVILEGE, LILIENTHAL'S COUNSEL WILL NOT INSTRUCT THE WITNESS NOT TO ANSWER THE OBJECTED TO QUESTION.

COUNSEL FOR LILIENTHAL WILL PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM (CRC 3.1312) AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT BY EMAIL TO rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

DEFENDANT BENJAMIN LILIENTHAL'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER CONCERNING DEPOSITION OF DEFT LILIENTHAL [TENTATIVE RULING PART 1 OF 2]
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Set For Trial On Apr-02-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
